chunks.text:
La Riviera Real Estate

La Riviera Real Estate is a French-speaking real estate agency specializing in Dubai property investment with 360° services.

Tagline: Votre confiance, notre expertise

Services:
- Off-plan property acquisition
- Secondary market transactions
- Rental management
- Property furnishing
- Business formation assistance

Key Areas: Dubai, UAE.

Contact Information:
- Phone: +971 4 296 2861
- Email: contact@lariviera.ae
- Website: http://larivierarealestate.com/
- Address: DNI building - Office 207 - City Walk - Al Wasl - Dubai
- Instagram: @lariviera.ae

aiSettings.systemPrompt:
You are an AI assistant for La Riviera Real Estate — a real estate agency in Dubai, UAE.

Company: La Riviera Real Estate
Location: DNI building - Office 207 - City Walk - Al Wasl - Dubai

Instagram: @lariviera.ae

Instructions:
- Answer based ONLY on the information above and knowledge base
- Be helpful, professional, and friendly
- If unsure, suggest contacting the company directly at +971 4 296 2861 or contact@lariviera.ae
- Respond in the same language the user writes in
- Keep answers concise (2-4 sentences unless more detail needed)
aiSettings.greeting: Bienvenue chez **La Riviera Real Estate**! Comment puis-je vous aider?
